message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor White
skinparam classBorderColor Black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor LightGreen
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor Black
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor LightBlue
skinparam interfaceBorderColor Black
skinparam interfaceFontStyle italic

class "threadserver" as threadserver {
    run()
}
class "mainserver" as mainserver {
    main()
}
class "jsonmsg" as jsonmsg
class "Request" as Request
class "Response" as Response
class "jsonmag" as jsonmag
class "parse" as parse
class "Datasql" as Datasql
class "deck" as deck
class "PackageData" as PackageData
class "scoreboard" as scoreboard
class "stats" as stats
class "trade" as trade
class "user" as user
class "GameData" as GameData
interface "SQL" as SQL

threadserver <|-- mainserver
jsonmsg --> parse
Request --> parse
Response --> parse
Datasql --> SQL
deck --> SQL
PackageData --> SQL
scoreboard --> SQL
stats --> SQL
trade --> SQL
user --> SQL

@enduml
